subject: New Opening: Microservices Engineer – Java – Public sector
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Förvaltningsdata AB (public sector) is looking for a senior Microservices Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: 2022-06-11
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 975 SEK/h

Required tech:
• Java
• GCP
• Redis

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Johan Bergström
Konsultchef
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 76 456 78 90
